name: domain-store-pattern
description: Auth domain provides complete reference implementation for domain stores. Uses createStoreFromScope with ArkType scope, three enhancement hooks (models, collections, rootStore), volatile state for loading/error, and environment service injection.
relevantCode: export function createAuthStore(options) { return createStoreFromScope(AuthDomain, { enhanceModels, enhanceCollections, enhanceRootStore }) }
recommendation: Follow same structure for createTeamsStore: define TeamsDomain scope, use enhancement hooks for computed permissions, add domain actions for CRUD operations.
